title: Wargaming — theater-level alliance-crisis wargame workbench
public_claim: A wargaming and crisis-analysis portfolio surface.
distinctive_mechanism: It organizes theater-level alliance-crisis scenarios through Blue Cell, Red Cell, and White Cell roles, decision points, ambiguity traps, distraction windows, slow-fade escalation, nine-move Master Scenario Events Lists, battle-plan orders, four-hypothesis-by-ten-evidence ACH matrices, five-assumption Key Assumptions Checks, ten-dimension measurement, and post-run assessment.
